headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on PACCAR, Raises Price Target to $126
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) with a Hold and raises the price target from $120 to $126.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on PACCAR, Raises Price Target to $126

headline: Why PACCAR (PCAR) Shares Are Plunging Today
summary: Shares of trucking company PACCAR (NASDAQ:PCAR) fell 6.1% in the afternoon session after the company reported first-quarter revenue that fell short of analysts' expectations, posting an 8.9% year-over-year decline.

headline: PACCAR Inc (PCAR) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Financial Performance Amid Market ...
summary: PACCAR Inc (PCAR) reports robust Q1 results with $6.8 billion in revenue and strategic investments to drive future growth despite market pressures.
